---
title: &TITLE Name
last: 
first: 
people_group: "researcher | gradstudent | undergraduate | alumni"
email: 
education:
  - deg | inst  <br> 
subtitle: "Undergraduate Research Assistant, dept | Graduate Student, dept "
description: ""
image: avatar.png
listing:
  id: pubs
  template: ../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs 
  contents: 
    - "../../../publications/**/*.qmd"
    - "!../../../publications/_template/"
  sort: "pub_number desc"
  # sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  include:
    author: *TITLE
  fields: [publication, title, image, author]
page-layout: full
about: 
  id: about
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image: avatar.png
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:email@example.org
---

<hr>


:::{#about}



## Education
{{< meta education >}}

<br>

:::

## {{< meta first >}}'s Group Publications

:::{#pubs}
:::
